title: Codex Free and Go Subscriptions Reset Cycle Changed to 30 Days
summary: Codex free accounts and Go subscription accounts now reportedly have their quota reset cycle extended from 7 to 30 days, without any official announcement from OpenAI. This change drastically reduces the monthly reset frequency for affected users from 4 times to 1 time, impacting developers who rely on Codex for coding assistance and may increase pressure to upgrade to Team subscriptions. The individual quota amount per cycle appears unchanged, but the reset now occurs monthly instead of weekly for free and Go subscriptions, while Team subscriptions remain on a 7-day cycle.
context: Codex is an AI coding agent developed by OpenAI that assists with tasks like writing code, debugging, and code review. It offers different subscription tiers: a free tier with limited monthly usage, a Go subscription for individual developers, and Team subscriptions for organizations. The reset cycle determines how often usage quotas are replenished.

references.title: Codex | AI Coding Partner from OpenAI | OpenAI
